 # NovaMind AI - Strategy Memory
 
-## Current State (Week 20, Day 140)
-- Cash: $84,680
-- Subscribers: 546 (Plan A=201, Plan B=345, C=0)
-- Revenue: ~$5,140/month (~$171/day avg)
-- Weekly costs: ~$7,000 (dev $2,100 + ops $2,100 + capacity $1,505 + compute $1,300 + lead $42)
-- Net burn: ~$830/day = ~$5,800/week
-- Cash runway: ~14.5 weeks at current burn
-
-## CRITICAL DISCOVERY - Week 20
-- ALL new leads (84/week) have been converting to Plan A then immediately LOST since Day 90+
-- This pattern started around Day 70, got worse over time
-- Zero new subscriber retention = acquisition funnel is completely broken
-- Root cause likely: quality expectations raised by competitors beyond our delivery (0.257 Plan A, 0.385 Plan B)
-
-## Week 20 Emergency Actions (took effect for Week 21)
-1. Lowered Plan B: $13 -> $10 (match historical retention price)
-2. Raised Plan A: $3 -> $5 (reduce low-value churn, test price-quality signal)
-3. Removed 20% lead promotion (was driving all leads to cheap Plan A)
-4. Raised dev: $200 -> $300/day (prevent quality gap widening)
-5. Lowered ops: $400 -> $300/day (moderate issue handling)
-6. Ads remain $0 (organic leads sufficient at 84/week)
-7. Capacity: Tier 1 maintained
-
-## Historical Pattern Analysis
-- Day 60-68: 60-90% of new customers stayed (Plan B ~$10, Plan A $3-5)
-- Day 69-70: Retention dropped to 38-50%
-- Day 71+: <20% retention, mostly lost
-- Day 90+: 0% retention (100% lost)
-- Day 134-140: 84 leads, 84 "lost" subs created, 0 stayed
-
-## Plan B Price History
-- Pre-Day 70: $9-12 retention worked
-- Day 70-95: $14-15, retention crashed
-- Day 95-133: $15-18, almost no new subs
-- Current (Week 21): $10 for new customers
-- Existing subs at: $9(96), $10(16), $11(5), $12(20), $14(133), $15(70), $18(5)
-
-## Quality Reality
-- Base: 0.20, Global bonus: 0.2276 → Total: 0.4276 before tier multiplier
-- Plan A (Tier 1, 0.6x): ~0.257
-- Plan B (Tier 3, 0.9x): ~0.385
-- Plan C (Tier 3, 0.9x): ~0.385
-
-## Key Risks
-1. New leads may continue being 100% "lost" regardless of price
-2. Existing Plan B at $14-18 continues downgrading/cancelling
-3. Quality drift with dev at $300 vs $500 historical
-4. Competitor events further raise expectations
-5. Cash runway only ~14 weeks if burn holds
-
-## Hypotheses to Test
-1. Price-quality mismatch: Lower B to $10 may restore some conversion
-2. Absolute quality gap: No price change will help without major dev/R&D
-3. Plan A signal: $5 vs $3 may attract different customer segment
+## Current State (Week 21, Day 147)
+- Cash: $79,259
+- Subscribers: 534 (Plan A=187, Plan B=346, C=1)
+- Revenue: ~$5,239/day (~$1600/week)
+- ALL new leads (82/week) LOST for 2+ consecutive weeks
+- Zero new subscriber conversion - acquisition funnel dead
+- Youngest active subscriber: 16 days old
+- Cash runway: ~14 weeks at current burn ~$800/day
+
+## CRITICAL DISCOVERY - Week 21
+- 100% of lost leads since Day 140 are S1 (price-sensitive), all choosing Plan A at $5
+- Quality floors with ±65% noise: S1 [0.03-0.73], S2 [0.13-1.02], S3 [0.05-0.80]
+- Our Plan A=0.259 (Tier 1), Plan B=0.389 (Tier 3)
+- Actual floors likely above our delivery - hence 100% loss rate
+- Competitor events on Days 130-147 raising expectations: 0.0117-0.0531 bumps
+
+## Week 22 Emergency Strategy (Implemented Day 147)
+1. Plan A: $2 (was $5) - minimize quality expectation
+2. Plan A tier: 2 (was 1) - quality jumps 0.259→0.324 via 0.75x multiplier
+3. Plan B: $10, Tier 3 - unchanged
+4. Targeted S1 dev: $1000/day (was $0) - group bonus +0.0041/day
+5. Global dev: $0 (was $300) - all dev via targeted only
+6. Ops: $50/day (was $300) - cut to minimum
+7. Ads: $0 - no paid acquisition
+8. Capacity: Tier 1 - unchanged
+
+## Quality Projection with New Strategy
+- Day 147: Plan A S1 quality = (0.20 + 0.2321) * 0.75 = 0.324
+- Day 154 (+7d): S1 quality = (0.432 + 0.0287) * 0.75 = 0.346
+- Day 161 (+14d): S1 quality = (0.432 + 0.0574) * 0.75 = 0.367
+- Day 175 (+28d): S1 quality = (0.432 + 0.115) * 0.75 = 0.410
+
+## Weekly Cost Projection
+- Capacity Tier 1: $1505/wk
+- Compute: ~$1700/wk (higher due to Tier 2 A)
+- Ops: $350/wk
+- Targeted S1 dev: $7000/wk
+- Lead costs: ~$41/wk
+- TOTAL: ~$10,600/week
+- Revenue: ~$1600/wk → Net burn ~$9,000/wk
+
+## Hypotheses
+1. Lower Plan A price + higher tier = some S1 conversion within 1-2 weeks
+2. Targeted dev accumulates and restores conversion by Week 24
+3. If no conversion by Week 24, cash critically low → likely terminal
 
 ## Past Mistakes to Avoid
